subcodes.first_line: O hoopoe of Solomon, wing thy flight with divine majesty unto verdant Sheba and its blossoming meadows. Thou shalt find them flourishing, yet how brief their glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای هدهد سلیمان پر حشمت الهی سفری بسبای سبز و صحرای خرم نما آباد یابی ولی چند
subcodes.subjects: @importance of community building, @chastisement and requital, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @call to action
